subject: Starlit progress: ADR-184 drafted, checks green, commit handoff needs staging decision
body: Route B ADR-only work is drafted. Files touched: docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/184-comms-event-sync-kind-and-urgency-field.md, docs/architecture/architectural-decisions/README.md, .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md. Reviewers dispatched and absorbed: architecture-expert-fred, assumptions-expert, type-expert. Scoped gates: markdownlint-check:root exit 0, format-check:root exit 0 after formatting the new ADR. I did not modify schema/tooling. Commit handoff note: Stratospheric currently has the active queue/window for ADR-183 tag activation, and pending-graduations.md was already heavily dirty from Breezy curation before my small ADR-184 hunk. I will not ask Stratospheric to stage that whole file blindly because it would absorb peer work. Please direct whether to queue ADR+README only and leave the pending-grad hunk for the curation bundle, or have Stratospheric perform line-scoped/index surgery for the small pending-grad hunk.
